task_completion.description: Create a root tiddler titled 'ProjectAlpha Documentation' with a brief project description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'ProjectAlpha Documentation' is visible in the TiddlyWiki interface, and its body contains some descriptive text about the project.

task_completion.description: Create three section tiddlers ('Architecture', 'API Reference', 'Getting Started') and tag them with the root title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tiddlers titled 'Architecture', 'API Reference', and 'Getting Started' are visible, and each displays a tag pill for 'ProjectAlpha Documentation' just below its title.

The tiddlers 'Database Schema Design', 'Microservices Overview', and 'Authentication Flow' display 'Architecture' in their tag pills, or they appear nested under 'Architecture' in the rendered Table of Contents.

task_completion.description: Tag the 4 API Reference-related tiddlers with 'API Reference'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddlers 'REST API Endpoints', 'GraphQL Queries', 'Error Codes Reference', and 'WebSocket Events' display 'API Reference' in their tag pills, or they appear nested under 'API Reference' in the rendered Table of Contents.

task_completion.description: Tag the 5 Getting Started-related tiddlers with 'Getting Started'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddlers 'Installation Guide', 'Configuration Options', 'Development Environment Setup', 'Deployment Checklist', and 'Troubleshooting Common Issues' display 'Getting Started' in their tag pills, or they appear nested under 'Getting Started' in the rendered Table of Contents.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Documentation Index' tiddler that uses a Table of Contents macro to display the full hierarchy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Documentation Index' is visible and displays a rendered, interactive hierarchical list (Table of Contents) showing the sections and their respective child tiddlers, rather than just raw macro text.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki web interface in Firefox.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox browser window is visible with the TiddlyWiki interface loaded at http://localhost:8080/.

integrity.description: The agent used TiddlyWiki's built-in UI for creating tiddlers and adding tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the TiddlyWiki edit mode, including the title input field, the tag input dropdown, and the text editor, rather than terminal commands or external text editors.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents macro was properly executed by the wiki engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Documentation Index' tiddler shows a formatted list of clickable links (the rendered TOC), not the raw text string '<<toc-selective-expandable ...>>'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Root tiddler: 'ProjectAlpha Documentation'. Section tiddlers (must be tagged with root): 'Architecture', 'API Reference', 'Getting Started'. Architecture children (must be tagged with 'Architecture'): 'Database Schema Design', 'Microservices Overview', 'Authentication Flow'. API Reference children (must be tagged with 'API Reference'): 'REST API Endpoints', 'GraphQL Queries', 'Error Codes Reference', 'WebSocket Events'. Getting Started children (must be tagged with 'Getting Started'): 'Installation Guide', 'Configuration Options', 'Development Environment Setup', 'Deployment Checklist', 'Troubleshooting Common Issues'. Index tiddler: 'Documentation Index'.
